data.description: Else Nutrition Reports Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results and Highlights Operational Progress, Strengthened Financial Foundation, and Clear Path Toward Profitability

data.title: Epsium Enterprise Limited Announces Board Changes
data.description: Today, on March 31, 2026, Epsium Enterprise Limited (Nasdaq: EPSM) revealed a significant update regarding its Board of Directors. Mr. Kewei Joshua Cui has decided to step down from his roles within the company. This change is set to take effect immediately.

data.title: Del Taco Celebrates National Burrito Day with Free Classic Burritos
data.description: In celebration of National Burrito Day, Del Taco will be offering a complimentary Classic Burrito on April 2 to Del Yeah! Rewards members who make a minimum purchase of $3. This special promotion allows members to enjoy a delicious burrito for free as part of the National Burrito Day festivities.

data.title: American Home Shield and Rachel Dratch Return for Year Three of “Warrantina” to Demystify the Misconceptions of Home Warranties
data.description: Frontdoor, Inc., the owner of American Home Shield, which is the top home warranty provider in the US, revealed the launch of its third year "Don’t Worry. Be Warranty." marketing campaign. The campaign features Rachel Dratch, the Emmy-nominated comedian, reprising her role as "Warrantina" to inform and simplify the home warranty sector for homeowners. This marks the third consecutive year of the campaign, emphasizing its success and viewership. Frontdoor, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ as FTDR.

data.title: High Arctic reports Q4 2025 financial and operating results.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over 50 years. The economy added a total of 531,000 jobs in the latest month, surpassing expectations. The growth was seen across various sectors, with notable increases in the leisure and hospitality industries. Additionally, wages saw a modest increase of 0.4% from the previous month. Economists are optimistic about the current trend and believe that the job market is showing strong signs of recovery following the challenges posed by the global pandemic.

data.title: AirSculpt Technologies Announces Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: In Miami Beach, Florida, on March 31, 2026, AirSculpt Technologies, Inc. ("AirSculpt") released news stating it is a top provider of high-end body contouring procedures. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AIRS, will disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 before the market opens on Thursday, April 2, 2026. An earnings conference call is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day.

data.title: BitRail Launches Powerful New Merchant Payment Suite That Helps Businesses Eliminate Fees and Take Control of Their Payments
data.description: BitRail, a prominent U.S. fintech firm, has announced an expansion of its branded payment platform through a collaboration with PaymentLock. The enhanced platform now includes innovative eCommerce features and tools designed for contemporary merchants. The development was disclosed in BOCA RATON, Fla., on March 31, 2026. This strategic partnership aims to provide modern merchants with cutting-edge solutions as BitRail continues to lead the industry.

data.title: OceanaGold to list on the New York Stock Exchange on April 7, 2026
data.description: In Vancouver, BC, on March 31, 2026, OceanaGold Corporation (TSX: OGC) (OTCQX: OCANF) disclosed the approval by the New York Stock Exchange ("NYSE") for listing its common shares. The company, OceanaGold, anticipates the common shares will now be available for trading on the NYSE, expanding its market reach. This move signifies a significant milestone for OceanaGold and opens up new opportunities for investors.

data.title: Myers Industries Announces Reporting Date and Conference Call for 2026 First Quarter Results
data.description: Akron, Ohio - Myers Industries has disclosed the reporting date and conference call schedule for their first-quarter results in 2026. The conference call is expected to take place on a specific date, giving investors and stakeholders insight into the company's performance during this period. This announcement signifies an opportunity for individuals to gain valuable information about Myers Industries, with the potential to impact their financial decisions.

data.title: Longitude Rx Appoints Stacy Walton as Inaugural Chief Commercial Officer to Accelerate Growth and Market Expansion
data.description: Today in Irving, Texas, Longitude Rx, a specialty pharmacy services organization owned by the health system, revealed the hiring of Stacy Walton as their first-ever Chief Commercial Officer (CCO). With over 30 years of experience in the specialty sector, Walton is set to lead the way in driving commercial strategies for the company.

data.title: Time's up for holding Solana on Magic Eden wallet - users must export private keys soon to avoid losing access to funds.
data.description: Users of the Magic Eden crypto wallet will soon need to export their private keys as support for the wallet is coming to an end. This move will ensure that users do not lose access to their funds stored in the wallet. It is important for all users to take action before the stated deadline to avoid any inconvenience.

data.title: HCW Biologics Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 and Fiscal Year 2025 Business Highlights and Financial Results
data.description: In Miramar, Florida, on March 31, 2026, HCW Biologics Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company traded as HCWB on NASDAQ, announced its financial performance for the three months concluded on December 31, 2025. The company focuses on developing fusion immunotherapeutics for diseases associated with chronic inflammation.

data.title: New Jersey American Water Concludes Temporary Treatment Change in Water Treatment Plants Serving Coastal Part of the State
data.description: In Camden, New Jersey, on March 31, 2026, it was announced that New Jersey American Water is set to finish its scheduled routine treatment change during the week of April 13. Following this, the company will revert to using chloramines at its Swimming River Water Treatment Plant located in Colts Neck and its Jumping Brook Water Treatment Plant.

data.title: ZyVersa Therapeutics Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
data.description: In the year 2025, ZyVersa Therapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company focusing on the development of innovative drugs for renal and inflammatory conditions, has disclosed its financial performance.

data.title: HMH Holding Inc. Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering
data.description: Today, HMH Holding Inc. disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering, revealing the offer of 10,520,000 shares of its Class A common stock at $20.00 per share. Additionally, underwriters hold a 30-day option to acquire up to 1,578,000 more shares at the IPO price, less discounts and commissions. The Class A common stock is slated to be available for trading on The Nasdaq Global Select Market starting April 1, 2026, under the ticker symbol "HMH." The IPO is anticipated to wrap up on April 2, 2026, pending standard closing conditions.
